Dramatically lowers the price of what they charge before an impression so to see the ad right because people like it and it keeps people on Facebook and they can then sell more advertising so it's you know, it's not evil on Facebook's part. I know Leo wouldn't mind it all so I had I used Leo as You know in the video so I had a video where that you'd watch Leo saying sell me this panel Leo saying some sort of speech Right, and then it was a click below to find out more click the link below and Then people would click on the link and they come to a landing page and see me You get it so they saw Leo on the ad and then they come and find me on language And that seems like a bait and switch now it was never intended to be a bait and switch right in my mind I thought people understood Leo was make it's my movie right, but I Learned my lesson because what happened was is I got a massive number of clicks and a very very low number of conversions You understand because there was a disconnect between between what I was advertising on Facebook and the experience people had on the landing page So what did I do? I changed my approach instead of having just Leo on the ad I Used a combination of Leo connecting to me and ended with me Saying with so it was me giving the call to action and me saying you come here and teach you about the system okay, that will help you close anyone who's closable all right and Boom you go to the ad now and there it is the proven sales training system for closing anyone who's closeable right and Just like that my conversion rate skyrocketed went through the roof Okay, so again, I want you to you must be very very careful that that your ad and go back to the ad Now again for me just you know, it's a bit more challenging for you I have so now I have so many ads out there. What's the one thing that will destroy your conversion rate more than anything else? Tell you what it is slow load times I went through this. I'm not gonna tell you I'm not gonna I'm not gonna down mouth the platform I was once on because I have a tremendous amount of respect for the person who created this But I was using a platform and I was having tremendous problems with bounce rate So what is bounce bounce rate means people would click on my head They go to the left to the landing page which is on someone else's platform and then people was like leaving I'm like, why is so many people leaving so quickly? Then when I had a company a really top marketing company Investigates it. This is the problem we have with this platform is that there's very slow load times on the platform So what happens they say it is like the state done this study if the load time is in excess of four seconds Four seconds your conversion rate goes down by 80% so those someone clicks watch you click on this link right here boom This thing this one now comes up if this video doesn't start playing within four seconds or it doesn't load slow load No one's gonna buy from you Okay, so again be very careful with what platform you go on there's some good ones There's some bad ones. So what was my solution? My solution was I'm a long-term player.
